$comment: Maps logical model tiers (used in subagent `model:` frontmatter) to concrete models. The `model:` field is a LOGICAL TIER, not a hard model ID. `default` runs out-of-the-box on Anthropic. To run on local models, stand up a LiteLLM proxy (see litellm.config.example.yaml + LOCAL-MODELS.md), point ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL at it, and activate a profile below. Nothing consumes this file automatically yet — it is the documented seam; resolution is wired when the local endpoint exists.

roles.$comment: Role → tier. Routing intent independent of which concrete model fills each tier: planning/verification want the strongest tier; bulk/coding can be cheaper or local.

local.$comment: All-local. LiteLLM model_names (defined in litellm.config.example.yaml) served by vLLM. Mapping rationale below.

hybrid.$comment: The planner=remote / coder=local split: Opus plans & verifies via the Anthropic API; a local coder implements. The intended primary shape once vLLM is up.

local_models.$comment: Inventory of the local models available (served via vLLM) and how each maps. Tier slots pick the best fit; the rest are documented alternates.
local_models.qwen2.5-vl-32b: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct — strongest general reasoner + vision (mockups/UI). → opus tier (planner/verify).
local_models.qwen2.5-coder-14b: Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct — best dedicated coder at a usable size. → sonnet tier (coder/reviewer).
local_models.deepseek-coder-v2-lite: DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct — fast MoE coder. Alternate coder; swap into sonnet for speed.
local_models.gemma-4-12b-qat: Gemma-4-12B-QAT — efficient quantized mid general. Alternate for opus/sonnet on constrained GPU.
local_models.gemma-4-e4b: Gemma-4-E4B — tiny, ultra-fast. Alternate haiku for classification/bulk.
local_models.nomic-embed: Nomic-Embed-Text-v1.5 — EMBEDDINGS only (RAG/semantic search), NOT a chat tier. Use for retrieval, not agent dispatch.
